name: API Design Prompt
description: Guidelines for designing RESTful APIs with Zod validation
content:
# API Design

When designing APIs, enforce input validation at the schema layer using Zod. Validate request bodies, query params, and path segments. Return 400 Bad Request for schema violations with clear error messages.

name: Error Handling Strategy
description: Best practices for error handling in connectors
content: Implement error boundaries at each integration point. Use typed errors with discriminated unions. Log errors with session context before returning to the framework.
